expected: The projects list does not imply unsupported all/search/sort behavior when the API only returns active projects.
redEvidence: Pre-fix test contract failed because PROJECTS_LIST_AVAILABLE_FILTERS/getVisibleProjects were not exported and the UI still exposed unsupported all/active switching.
fixApplied: Removed the unsupported 'Все/Активные' segmented control and story copy; added a tiny active-only helper/guard test so the UI matches the active-projects API contract.
limitations: Browser traversal was not run in this slice.
regressionRisk: Low. This removes a fake control and preserves the active projects list.
